sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dt64 (`event_time` DateTime64(6, 'UTC'), `event_id` UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
SELECT event_id FROM test_dt64 WHERE event_time = toDateTime64('2023-01-01 12:00:00.123456', 6, 'UTC');
UPDATE test_dt64 SET event_time = toDateTime64('2023-01-03 15:30:40.000001', 6, 'UTC') WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT toDateTime64(event_time, 6, 'Asia/Tokyo') AS tokyo_time, event_id FROM test_dt64;
